description: Ground support packages, tools, modules, workflows, and agents for GroundControl.

packages.name: Azure / Entra ID Admin
packages.description: Manage Entra ID users and groups via Microsoft Graph. Supports 14 operations across users and groups including list, get, create, update, disable, delete, and CSV export. Requires Microsoft.Graph PowerShell modules and a configured service principal profile or an interactive Graph session.

packages.name: Hello World
packages.description: A minimal example package demonstrating the grndctrl-delta structure. Useful as a template for new packages.

actions.name: say_hello
actions.description: Returns a greeting for the given name.

packages.name: Configure Sites Selected PnP
packages.description: Grants an Entra ID app registration Sites.Selected access to a single SharePoint Online site using PnP.PowerShell. Use this when an app already has Microsoft Graph Sites.Selected application permission and admin consent, and needs scoped access to one site.

actions.name: configure_sites_selected_access
actions.description: Grant a target Entra app registration Read, Write, Manage, or FullControl access to a specified SharePoint Online site through an interactive PnP.PowerShell admin sign-in. Call this when configuring least-privilege selected-site access for an app that already has Graph Sites.Selected application permission and admin consent.

config_requirements.description: The ID of the Azure AD tenant to connect to.
The client ID of the service principal used for authentication.
The client secret of the service principal used for authentication.
Path to the certificate used for service principal authentication.

modules.name: GC Logging
modules.description: Shared structured logging helpers used by all packages. Writes JSON log entries to the GroundControl log path.

modules.name: GC Graph Connect
modules.description: Shared Microsoft Graph authentication helper. Supports service principal auth via GC_AZURE_* env vars (client secret or certificate) with graceful fallback to an existing delegated session. Used by any package that calls Microsoft Graph APIs.

workflows.name: Daily File Summary
workflows.description: Scans the reports folder each morning for new files and writes a structured summary to outputs/. A starter example showing scheduled workflow structure.

agents.name: File Ops Agent
agents.description: A minimal agent with read/write file permissions. Good starting point for workflows that process local files.
